notes: 状态: **done**（yearly 价格直接显示，monthly 价格通过折扣反算并标记来源）

plans.name: Free
plans.description: For individuals looking to explore Runway's AI Tools and content creation features
bullets: For individuals looking to explore Runway's AI Tools and content creation features
125 credits = 25s of Gen-4 Turbo or Gen-3 Alpha Turbo
Generative Video: Gen-4 Turbo (Image to Video)
Generative Image: Gen-4 (Text to Image, References)

plans.name: Standard
plans.description: For individuals and small teams looking for more access, more AI Tools and more
bullets: For individuals and small teams looking for more access, more AI Tools and more
625 credits = 25s of Gen-4.5, 52s of Gen-4, 125s of Gen-4 Turbo, 78 Gen-4 Images
Generative Video: Aleph (Video Editing), Gen-4.5 (Text to Video), Gen-4 (Image to Video), Act-Two (Performance Capture), Veo 3.1, Veo 3
Video Apps: Upscale resolution, All video models, Remove watermarks

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For individuals and teams looking to add all of Runway's features into their work
bullets: For individuals and teams looking to add all of Runway's features into their work
2250 credits = 90s of Gen-4.5, 187s of Gen-4, 450s of Gen-4 Turbo, 281 Gen-4 Images
Create Custom Voices for Lip Sync and Text to Speech

plans.name: Unlimited
bullets: All the access of the pro plan with the flexibility of unlimited video generation
Unlimited generations of Aleph, Gen-4.5, Gen-4 Turbo, Gen-4 (Image and Video), Act-Two

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For teams and organizations that need customization, advanced security and support
bullets: For teams and organizations that need customization, advanced security and support
Includes all Pro Plan features, plus:
